Clickables: Bespin.description: Bespin clickable collection items. Visit waypoints to find and click objects.

Imperial Death Trooper Armor 1.notes: /way bespin 153 680 Imperial Death Trooper Armor 1. Medical Center POI, ground floor.

Imperial Death Trooper Armor 2 - Generat.notes: /way -351 -502 Imperial Death Trooper Armor 2 - Generator Complex. Generator Complex POI, locked behind the Bespin Quest Line.

Imperial Death Trooper Armor 3 - 3rd Flo.notes: /way bespin 266 -310 Imperial Death Trooper Armor 3 - 3rd Floor. Gale's Club and Casino POI, third floor, in the NW corner of the small room behind the bar.

Imperial Death Trooper Armor 4 - Wing Gu.notes: /way -260 -303 Imperial Death Trooper Armor 4 - Wing Guard HQ, 2nd Floor. Wing Guard Headquarters POI, second floor, behind a planter.

Imperial Death Trooper Armor 5 - Wing Gu.notes: /way -340 -228 Imperial Death Trooper Armor 5 - Wing Guard HQ, 4th Floor. Wing Guard Headquarters POI, fourth floor, you can safely run by the Rogue Maintenance Droids, they don't chase very far.

Imperial Death Trooper Armor 6 - Wing Gu.notes: /way -402 -340 Imperial Death Trooper Armor 6 - Wing Guard HQ, 9th Floor. Wing Guard Headquarters POI, ninth floor, head west from the elevator room.

Imperial Death Trooper Armor 7 - Mining.notes: /way -321 -170 Imperial Death Trooper Armor 7 - Mining Sector. Mining Sector instance, en route to the Carbon Freezing Chamber.

Imperial Death Trooper Armor 8 - Mining.notes: /way -272 -615 Imperial Death Trooper Armor 8 - Mining Sector. Mining Sector instance, head East as you exit the elevator.

Imperial Death Trooper Armor 9 - Industr.notes: /way -265 138 Imperial Death Trooper Armor 9 - Industrial Sector. Industrial Sector instance, follow the hall that heads south as you exit the elevator.

Imperial Death Trooper Armor 10 - Indust.notes: /way -214 16 Imperial Death Trooper Armor 10 - Industrial Sector. Industrial Sector instance, southern section. The droids in this room are level 85-89, you may need a friend or alt to take them down if you are not a combat class.

Imperial Patrol Trooper Armor 1.notes: /way bespin 551 613 Imperial Patrol Trooper Armor 1. Wing Guard Barracks POI, basement floor.

Imperial Patrol Trooper Armor 2 - 2nd Fl.notes: /way bespin 224 -107 Imperial Patrol Trooper Armor 2 - 2nd Floor. Trest Tower Hotel, second floor. The gold elite boss in the room can be avoided through luck and timing.

Imperial Patrol Trooper Armor 3 - Wing G.notes: /way -315 -403 Imperial Patrol Trooper Armor 3 - Wing Guard HQ, 3rd Floor. Wing Guard Headquarters POI, 3rd floor, head south from the elevator. The level 90 droids along the way can be sprinted past however mobs near the collection piece will need to be dispatched.

Imperial Patrol Trooper Armor 4 - Wing G.notes: /way -172 -462 Imperial Patrol Trooper Armor 4 - Wing Guard HQ, 5th Floor. Wing Guard Headquarters POI, 5th floor, head south from the elevator room.

Imperial Patrol Trooper Armor 5 - Wing G.notes: /way -206 -40 Imperial Patrol Trooper Armor 5 - Wing Guard HQ, 7th Floor. Wing Guard Headquarters POI, 7th floor, all the way north, last room to the east.

Imperial Patrol Trooper Armor 6 - Wing G.notes: /way -401 -341 Imperial Patrol Trooper Armor 6 - Wing Guard HQ, 9th Floor. Wing Guard Headquarters POI, 9th floor, head west from the elevator room.

Imperial Patrol Trooper Armor 7 - Mining.notes: /way -114 -197 Imperial Patrol Trooper Armor 7 - Mining Sector. Mining Sector instance, northern section, eastern half. The level 87 Evacuating Ugnaught mobs may become hostile but can be avoided depending on their patrol route.

Imperial Patrol Trooper Armor 8 - Mining.notes: /way -273 0 Imperial Patrol Trooper Armor 8 - Mining Sector. Mining Sector instance, inside the Carbon Freezing Chamber.

Imperial Patrol Trooper Armor 9 - Indust.notes: /way -261 139 Imperial Patrol Trooper Armor 9 - Industrial Sector. Industrial Sector instance, follow the hall that heads south as you exit the elevator.

Imperial Patrol Trooper Armor 10 - Indus.notes: /way -189 44 Imperial Patrol Trooper Armor 10 - Industrial Sector. Industrial Sector instance, southern section. The droids in this room are level 89 silver elites, you may need a friend to help you take them down to gather the collection.

Rebel Prototype Armor 1 - Basement.notes: /way bespin 550 560 Rebel Prototype Armor 1 - Basement. Basement floor of the Wing Guard Barracks.

Rebel Prototype Armor 2 - 2nd Floor.notes: /way bespin -43 -579 Rebel Prototype Armor 2 - 2nd Floor. Administrator's Tower POI, easternmost tower.

Rebel Prototype Armor 3 - Wing Guard HQ,.notes: /way -252 -239 Rebel Prototype Armor 3 - Wing Guard HQ, Basement. Wing Guard Headquarters POI, basement level.

Rebel Prototype Armor 4 - Wing Guard HQ,.notes: /way -274 -298 Rebel Prototype Armor 4 - Wing Guard HQ, 4th Floor. Wing Guard Headquarters POI, 4th floor. You can safely run by the level 90 Rogue Maintenance Droids, they do not pursue players very far.

Rebel Prototype Armor 5 - Wing Guard HQ,.notes: /way -171 -351 Rebel Prototype Armor 5 - Wing Guard HQ, 9th Floor. Wing Guard Headquarters POI, 9th floor in the corner of a room filled with level 90 escaped convicts. Easy enough to avoid combat to grab these crates if you sprint by quickly or along the edges.

Rebel Prototype Armor 6 - Mining Sector,.notes: /way -376 -370 Rebel Prototype Armor 6 - Mining Sector, 2nd Floor. Mining Sector instance, 2nd floor, en route to the Carbon Freezing Chamber.

Rebel Prototype Armor 7 - Mining Sector,.notes: /way -269 -120 Rebel Prototype Armor 7 - Mining Sector, 2nd Floor. Mining Sector instance, en route to the Carbon Freezing Chamber

Rebel Prototype Armor 8 - Mining Sector.notes: /way -182 -255 Rebel Prototype Armor 8 - Mining Sector. Mining Sector instance, in a room full of yellow level 87 Ugnaughts and level 88 droids. you may need a friend or alt to take them down if you are not a combat class.

Rebel Prototype Armor 9 - Industrial Sec.notes: /way -98 209 Rebel Prototype Armor 9 - Industrial Sector. Industrial Sector instance, behind the entrance elevator.

Rebel Prototype Armor 10 - Industrial Se.notes: /way -258 34 Rebel Prototype Armor 10 - Industrial Sector. Industrial Sector instance, southern section.

Rebel Specialist Armor 1, Basement.notes: /way bespin 199 6 Rebel Specialist Armor 1, Basement. Apartment 108 Complex POI, basement level. The level 87 Ugnaughts guarding the collection piece have a 1 minute and 50 second respawn time after being slain.

Rebel Specialist Armor 2.notes: /way bespin -69 -561 Rebel Specialist Armor 2. Administrator's Tower POI, second floor, easternmost tower.

Rebel Specialist Armor 3 - Wing Guard HQ.notes: /way -342 -259 Rebel Specialist Armor 3 - Wing Guard HQ, 2nd Floor. Wing Guard Headquarters POI, second floor. It's far enough from the hostile mobs to avoid aggro from grabbing it.

Rebel Specialist Armor 4 - Wing Guard HQ.notes: /way -252 -240 Rebel Specialist Armor 4 - Wing Guard HQ, Basement. Wing Guard Headquarters POI, basement level.

Rebel Specialist Armor 5 - Wing Guard HQ.notes: /way -323 -309 Rebel Specialist Armor 5 - Wing Guard HQ, 3rd Floor. Wing Guard Headquarters POI, third floor, western prison cell block.

Rebel Specialist Armor 6 - Wing Guard HQ.notes: /way -386 -232 Rebel Specialist Armor 6 - Wing Guard HQ, 7th Floor. Wing Guard Headquarters POI, seventh floor, room immediately west out of the elevator.

Rebel Specialist Armor 7 - Wing Guard HQ.notes: /way -173 -351 Rebel Specialist Armor 7 - Wing Guard HQ, 9th Floor. Wing Guard Headquarters POI, ninth floor, go south from the elevator, into the rectangular room with level 90 escaped escaped criminals. Easy enough to avoid combat to grab the collection piece if you sprint by quickly or along the edges.

Rebel Specialist Armor 8 - Mining Sector.notes: /way -294 84 Rebel Specialist Armor 8 - Mining Sector. Mining Sector, just beyond the Carbon Freezing Chamber.

Rebel Specialist Armor 9 - Industrial Se.notes: /way -277 325 Rebel Specialist Armor 9 - Industrial Sector. Industrial Sector instance, northern section.

Rebel Specialist Armor 10 - Industrial S.notes: /way -263 33 Rebel Specialist Armor 10 - Industrial Sector. Industrial Sector instance, southern section.

CCT Protector Armor 1.notes: /way bespin 538 -306 CCT Protector Armor 1. Security Center POI, ground floor, small room just past the elevators.

CCT Protector Armor 2 - Basement.notes: /way bespin 633 107 CCT Protector Armor 2 - Basement. Wing Guard Speeder Depot POI, basement level.

CCT Protector Armor 3 - Basement.notes: /way bespin 548 511 CCT Protector Armor 3 - Basement. Wing Guard Barracks POI, basement level, first room on the left.

CCT Protector Armor 4 - 2nd Floor.notes: /way bespin 82 380 CCT Protector Armor 4 - 2nd Floor. Hospital POI, 2nd floor. From the elevator, go East to exit the first building then cross the bridge connecting it to the southern tower.

CCT Protector Armor 5 - Generator Comple.notes: /way -274 -660 CCT Protector Armor 5 - Generator Complex. Generator Complex POI, enter the instance. Head south after you enter, the piece is in the SE room of the complex, guarded by a few level 88 Rogue Security Droids.

CCT Protector Armor 6.notes: /way bespin -635 166 CCT Protector Armor 6. Science Tower POI, NW corner.

CCT Protector Armor 7 - 2nd Floor.notes: /way bespin -572 -130 CCT Protector Armor 7 - 2nd Floor. Tibanna Prime Trader Guildhall POI, 2nd floor, next to Marcedwi Sundpet (a Tailor Expert).

CCT Protector Armor 8 - 2nd Floor.notes: /way bespin -362 -668 CCT Protector Armor 8 - 2nd Floor. Administrator's Tower POI, 2nd floor, in a storage room to the NW where Meikar is hiding.

CCT Protector Armor 9 M- 2nd Floor.notes: /way bespin 240 -260 CCT Protector Armor 9 M- 2nd Floor. Gale's Central Club and Casino POI, 2nd floor, Zorba the Hutt's room.+

CCT Protector Armor 10 - Wing Guard HQ,.notes: /way -230 -63 CCT Protector Armor 10 - Wing Guard HQ, 1st Floor. Wing Guard Headquarters POI, 1st floor. Immediately after entering the instance, head North, it's the last room on the right.

Guavian Armor 1.notes: /way bespin 556 -384 Guavian Armor 1. Security Center POI, ground floor. Locked behind Bespin Quest Line.

Guavian Armor 2 - Generator Complex.notes: /way -351 -489 Guavian Armor 2 - Generator Complex. Generator Complex POI, inside instance. Activate the WP once inside the instance.

Guavian Armor 3 - Second Floor.notes: /way bespin -444 245 Guavian Armor 3 - Second Floor. Apartment 398 Complex POI, second floor.

Guavian Armor 4 - Third Floor.notes: /way bespin -614 -96 Guavian Armor 4 - Third Floor. Tibanna Prime Trader Guildhall, third floor.

Guavian Armor 5 - Second Floor.notes: /way bespin -447 -76 Guavian Armor 5 - Second Floor. Apartment Complex POI, second floor. Guarded by 8 level 90 Thieves which respawn roughly 1 minute and 45 seconds after dying.

Guavian Armor 6.notes: /way bespin -208 -563 Guavian Armor 6. Administrator's Tower POI, smelter room.

Guavian Armor 7 - Fourth Floor.notes: /way bespin 259 -108 Guavian Armor 7 - Fourth Floor. Trest Tower Hotel POI, fourth floor. Can aggro the gold elite boss in the opposite room if the doors are open.

Guavian Armor 8.notes: /way bespin -841 93 Guavian Armor 8. Industrial Starport POI.

Guavian Armor 9.notes: /way bespin -39 527 Guavian Armor 9. In the middle of a small park, protected by 12 level 90 Guavian Death Gang Henchmen. They respawn 80 seconds after death, be quick about grabbing the item or bring a friend to cover you.

Guavian Armor 10.notes: /way bespin 944 151 Guavian Armor 10. Cloud City Spaceport POI, landing Platform Two, next to a stack of crates.

Camtono 1 - 2nd Floor.notes: /way bespin 1 114 Camtono 1 - 2nd Floor. Central Tower POI, second floor via the South Elevator. It's against the curved wall next to a bookcase.

Camtono 2 - 2nd Floor.notes: /way bespin 171 691 Camtono 2 - 2nd Floor. Medical Center POI, second floor, hidden at the end of the Mon Calamari scientist's desk.

Camtono 3 - Basement.notes: /way bespin 594 614 Camtono 3 - Basement. Wing Guard Barracks POI, basement level. Go North until you reach the last room on the right, it is hidden next to a small round table.

Camtono 4 - Basement.notes: /way bespin 694 107 Camtono 4 - Basement. Wing Guard Speeder Depot POI, basement level. Head East down the hall, last room on the left. The is hidden behind a desk as you walk in to the room.

Camtono 5 - Underground Cantina.notes: /way -59 305 Camtono 5 - Underground Cantina. Underground Sector POI, inside the Cantina. Hidden behind the first set of chairs on the right.

Camtono 6 - Legends Club Cantina.notes: /way bespin 511 -157 Camtono 6 - Legends Club Cantina. Legends Club Cantina POI, second floor, hidden behind a planter and a bench.

Camtono 7 - 2nd Floor.notes: /way bespin 191 -774 Camtono 7 - 2nd Floor. Yarith Bespin POI, second floor. Head to the kitchen via the door at /way 205-765

Camtono 8 - 2nd Floor.notes: /way bespin 163 -250 Camtono 8 - 2nd Floor. Gale's Central Club and Casino POI, second floor, NW room. The is hidden behind the main table in that room.

Camtono 9 - Wing Guard HQ, 2nd Floor.notes: /way -184 -251 Camtono 9 - Wing Guard HQ, 2nd Floor. Wing Guard Headquarters POI, second floor, hidden behind a planter in the easternmost room.

Camtono 10 - Mining Sector.notes: /way -239 21 Camtono 10 - Mining Sector. Industrial and Mining Sector POI, Mining Sector instance. Travel to the Carbon Freezing Chamber, it is in the room which branches off to the NE from it.

Rug Collection 1 - Third Floor.notes: /way bespin 268 -321 Rug Collection 1 - Third Floor. Gale's Central Club and Casino, third floor.

Rug Collection 2 - Second Floor.notes: /way bespin -1 105 Rug Collection 2 - Second Floor. Central Tower POI, second floor via the North Elevator.

Rug Collection 3 - Fourth Floor.notes: /way bespin 227 -64 Rug Collection 3 - Fourth Floor. Trest Tower Hotel POI, fourth floor. Can aggro the gold elite boss in the opposite room if the doors are open.

Rug Collection 4.notes: /way bespin 213 -747 Rug Collection 4. Yarith Bespin POI, ground floor.

Rug Collection 5 - Legends Club Cantina.notes: /way bespin 545 -111 Rug Collection 5 - Legends Club Cantina. Legends Club Cantina POI, second floor.

Rug Collection 6 - Fourth Floor.notes: /way bespin 257 -94 Rug Collection 6 - Fourth Floor. Trest Tower Hotel POI, fourth floor. Is guarded by a level 87 silver elite Stargazer Lieutenant. Damage him for 75% of his health and he becomes non-hostile for one minute.

Rug Collection 7 - Second Floor.notes: /way bespin -428 -206 Rug Collection 7 - Second Floor. Apartment Complex POI, second floor. Guarded by 5 level 90 Stargazer thugs which respawn in roughly 1 minute and 45 seconds after dying.

Rug Collection 8 - Basement Floor.notes: /way bespin 575 -548 Rug Collection 8 - Basement Floor. Museum POI, basement.

Rug Collection 9.notes: /way bespin -282 -666 Rug Collection 9. Administrator's Tower POI, ground floor.

Rug Collection 10 - Second Floor.notes: /way bespin 64 228 Rug Collection 10 - Second Floor. Central Tower POI, second floor via the South Elevator.

Rug Collection 11 - Third Floor.notes: /way bespin -627 -83 Rug Collection 11 - Third Floor. Tibanna Prime Trader Guild Hall POI, third floor.

Rug Collection 12.notes: /way bespin -205 -558 Rug Collection 12. Administrator's Tower POI, smelter room.

Rug Collection 13 - Second Floor.notes: /way bespin 224 50 Rug Collection 13 - Second Floor. Apartment 108 Complex POI, second floor.

Rug Collection 14 - Second Floor.notes: /way bespin -492 242 Rug Collection 14 - Second Floor. Apartment 398 Complex POI, second floor.

Panoramic Vista 9 - Mining Sector.notes: /way -293 216  Panoramic Vista 9 - Mining Sector. In the mining sector

Panoramic Vista 10 - Underground Sector.notes: /way -81 289 Panoramic Vista 10 - Underground Sector. In the underground sector
